response.justification: Strong software engineering foundation with current AI-agent infrastructure experience, but lacks the demonstrated 8+ years of production-grade AI solutions building required for this staff-level role. Career shows recent pivot to GenAI (1+ year at re:cinq) rather than deep AI/ML systems background. Critical gaps include no mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or customer-facing technical leadership in GenAI contexts.
strengths: Currently developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, directly addressing agentic workflow patterns
Staff-level experience with proven ability to mentor teams and drive engineering excellence across technical domains
Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS infrastructure expertise with demonstrated ability to build systems handling scale
concerns: Only 1+ year of explicit AI/GenAI work; 8-year requirement for production AI solutions not demonstrated across 17-year career primarily in web/backend platforms
Vector databases, RAG architectures, and LLM performance optimization not mentioned; Python expertise not demonstrated despite listing
No evidence of leading customer-facing technical discovery sessions or AI architecture integration with enterprise systems and legacy infrastructure

key_factors.factor: 8+ years AI/ML production systems experience requirement
Recent AI infrastructure focus and modern tech stack alignment
Staff-level mentorship and engineering leadership capability
